controls.control_objective: To ensure be called the master direction - reserve bank of india (certificate of deposit) directions, 2021
controls.control_description:
(a) These Directions shall be called the Master Direction - Reserve Bank of India (Certificate
of Deposit) Directions, 2021.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be called the master direction - reserve bank of india (certificate of deposit) directions, 2021

controls.control_objective: To ensure come into force with effect from june 07, 2021
controls.control_description: (b) These Directions shall come into force with effect from June 07, 2021.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to come into force with effect from june 07, 2021

controls.control_objective: To ensure a banking company (including a payment bank and a small finance bank) as defined in clause (c) of section 5 of the banking regulation act, 1949 or a "
controls.control_description:
(i) "Bank" means a banking company (including a Payment Bank and a Small Finance
Bank) as defined in clause (c) of section 5 of the Banking Regulation Act, 1949 or a
"regional rural bank", a "corresponding new bank" or "State Bank of India" as defined
in clauses (ja), (da) and (nc), of section 5 respectively thereof, or a "cooperative bank"
as defined in clause (cci) of section 5 read with section 56 of the said Act;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to a banking company (including a payment bank and a small finance bank) as defined in clause (c) of section 5 of the banking regulation act, 1949 or a "

controls.control_objective: To ensure interest rates administered by financial benchmark administrators
controls.control_description:
(ii) "Benchmark Interest Rates" means interest rates administered by Financial
Benchmark Administrators;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to interest rates administered by financial benchmark administrators

controls.control_objective: To ensure a settlement mechanism which stipulates that transfer of funds from the buyer of securities is made simultaneously with the transfer of securities by
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to a settlement mechanism which stipulates that transfer of funds from the buyer of securities is made simultaneously with the transfer of securities by

controls.control_objective: To ensure have the meaning assigned in section 2 (e) of the depositories act, 1996 (22 of 1996)
controls.control_description:
(v) "Depository" shall have the meaning assigned in section 2 (e) of the Depositories
Act, 1996 (22 of 1996);
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have the meaning assigned in section 2 (e) of the depositories act, 1996 (22 of 1996)

controls.control_objective: To ensure have the meaning assigned in paragraph 2 (1) (iii) of the electronic trading platform (reserve bank) directions, 2018 dated october 05, 2018 as modifi
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have the meaning assigned in paragraph 2 (1) (iii) of the electronic trading platform (reserve bank) directions, 2018 dated october 05, 2018 as modifi

controls.control_objective: To ensure a person who controls the creation, operation and administration of financial benchmark(s) authorized under financial benchmark administrators (reserv
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to a person who controls the creation, operation and administration of financial benchmark(s) authorized under financial benchmark administrators (reserv

controls.control_objective: To ensure include those executed on electronic trading platforms
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to include those executed on electronic trading platforms

controls.control_objective: To ensure have the same meaning assigned to it in section 2
controls.control_description: (ix) "Person resident in India" shall have the same meaning assigned to it in section 2
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have the same meaning assigned to it in section 2

controls.control_objective: To ensure have the meaning assigned in section 2 (f) of the securities contract regulation act, 1956
controls.control_description:
(x) "Recognised stock exchanges" shall have the meaning assigned in section 2 (f) of
the Securities Contract Regulation Act, 1956;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have the meaning assigned in section 2 (f) of the securities contract regulation act, 1956

controls.control_objective: To ensure a bank licensed under section 22 of the banking regulation act, 1949 and governed by the terms of the "reserve bank guidelines for licensing of small
controls.control_description:
(xi) "Small Finance Bank" means a bank licensed under section 22 of the Banking
Regulation Act, 1949 and governed by the terms of the "Reserve Bank Guidelines for
Licensing of Small Finance Banks" dated November 27, 2014, as amended from time
to time.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to a bank licensed under section 22 of the banking regulation act, 1949 and governed by the terms of the "reserve bank guidelines for licensing of small

controls.control_objective: To ensure have the meaning assigned to them in the reserve bank of india act, 1934
controls.control_description:
(b) Words and expressions used but not defined in these Directions shall have the meaning
assigned to them in the Reserve Bank of India Act, 1934.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have the meaning assigned to them in the reserve bank of india act, 1934

controls.control_objective: To ensure be issued by:
controls.control_description: (a) Certificate of Deposits (CDs) may be issued by:
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be issued by:

controls.control_objective: To ensure be guided by the directions contained in master circular no
controls.control_description:
(b) CDs issued by the All India Financial Institution shall be guided by the Directions contained
in Master Circular No.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be guided by the directions contained in master circular no

controls.control_objective: To ensure be issued to all persons resident in india
controls.control_description:
Eligible investors
CDs may be issued to all persons resident in India.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be issued to all persons resident in india

controls.control_objective: To ensure be issued only in dematerialised form and held with a depository registered with securities and exchange board of india
controls.control_description:
(i) CDs shall be issued only in dematerialised form and held with a depository registered
with Securities and Exchange Board of India.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be issued only in dematerialised form and held with a depository registered with securities and exchange board of india

controls.control_objective: To ensure be issued in minimum denomination of ₹5 lakh and in multiples of ₹5 lakh thereafter
controls.control_description:
(ii) CDs shall be issued in minimum denomination of ₹5 lakh and in multiples of ₹5 lakh
thereafter.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be issued in minimum denomination of ₹5 lakh and in multiples of ₹5 lakh thereafter

controls.control_objective: To ensure be less than seven days and shall not exceed one year
controls.control_description:
(iii) The tenor of a CD at issuance shall not be less than seven days and shall not exceed
one year.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be less than seven days and shall not exceed one year

controls.control_objective: To ensure be issued on a t+1 basis where t represents the date of closure of the offer period for issuance of the cds
controls.control_description:
(iv) CDs shall be issued on a T+1 basis where T represents the date of closure of the
offer period for issuance of the CDs.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be issued on a t+1 basis where t represents the date of closure of the offer period for issuance of the cds

controls.control_objective: To ensure be issued at a discount to the face value
controls.control_description:
(b) Discount/coupon rate
CDs may be issued at a discount to the face value.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be issued at a discount to the face value

controls.control_objective: To ensure also be issued on a fixed / floating rate basis provided the interest rate on the floating rate cd is reset at periodic rests agreed to at the time of
controls.control_description:
CDs may also be issued on a fixed /
floating rate basis provided the interest rate on the floating rate CD is reset at periodic
rests agreed to at the time of issue and is linked to a benchmark published by a Financial
Benchmark Administrator or approved by the Fixed Income Money Market and Derivatives
Association of India (FIMMDA) for this purpose.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to also be issued on a fixed / floating rate basis provided the interest rate on the floating rate cd is reset at periodic rests agreed to at the time of

controls.control_objective: To ensure ensure that any floating rate approved by them for this purpose is determined transparently, objectively and in arm's length transactions
controls.control_description:
FIMMDA shall ensure that any floating
rate approved by them for this purpose is determined transparently, objectively and in
arm's length transactions.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to ensure that any floating rate approved by them for this purpose is determined transparently, objectively and in arm's length transactions

controls.control_objective: To ensure be traded either in over-the-counter (otc) markets, including on electronic trading platforms, or on recognised stock exchanges with the approval of t
controls.control_description:
(i) CDs shall be traded either in Over-the-Counter (OTC) markets, including on Electronic
Trading Platforms, or on recognised stock exchanges with the approval of the
Reserve Bank.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be traded either in over-the-counter (otc) markets, including on electronic trading platforms, or on recognised stock exchanges with the approval of t

controls.control_objective: To ensure be t+0 or t+1
controls.control_description: (ii) The settlement cycle for OTC trades in CDs shall be T+0 or T+1.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be t+0 or t+1

controls.control_objective: To ensure be settled on a dvp basis through the clearing corporation of any recognized stock exchange or any other mechanism approved by the reserve bank
controls.control_description:
(iii) All secondary market transactions in CDs shall be settled on a DvP basis through the
clearing corporation of any recognized stock exchange or any other mechanism
approved by the Reserve Bank.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be settled on a dvp basis through the clearing corporation of any recognized stock exchange or any other mechanism approved by the reserve bank

controls.control_objective: To ensure be subject to the following conditions:
controls.control_description:
Buyback of CDs shall be
subject to the following conditions:
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be subject to the following conditions:

controls.control_objective: To ensure be made to all investors in a particular cd issue on identical terms and conditions
controls.control_description:
(ii) The buyback offer shall be made to all investors in a particular CD issue on identical
terms and conditions.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be made to all investors in a particular cd issue on identical terms and conditions

controls.control_objective: To ensure have the option to accept or reject the buyback offer
controls.control_description:
The investors shall have the option to accept or reject the
buyback offer;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have the option to accept or reject the buyback offer

controls.control_objective: To ensure be at the prevailing market price
controls.control_description: (iii) Buyback of CDs shall be at the prevailing market price;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be at the prevailing market price

controls.control_objective: To ensure be extinguished
controls.control_description: (iv) CDs bought back, partially or in full, shall be extinguished.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be extinguished

controls.control_objective: To ensure be between 9:00 am and 5:00 pm on a business day or as specified by the reserve bank from time to time
controls.control_description:
(f) Market timings
Primary issuance and secondary market trading hours shall be between 9:00 AM and 5:00
PM on a business day or as specified by the Reserve Bank from time to time.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be between 9:00 am and 5:00 pm on a business day or as specified by the reserve bank from time to time

controls.control_objective: To ensure follow the standardised procedures and documentation which may be prescribed by fimmda, in consultation with the reserve bank, for operational flexibi
controls.control_description:
(h) Market practices and documentation
Eligible participants and agencies in the CD market shall follow the standardised
procedures and documentation which may be prescribed by FIMMDA, in consultation with
the Reserve Bank, for operational flexibility and smooth functioning of the markets.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to follow the standardised procedures and documentation which may be prescribed by fimmda, in consultation with the reserve bank, for operational flexibi

controls.control_objective: To ensure be governed by relevant regulations of the reserve bank
controls.control_description:
(i) Reserve requirements
Reserve requirements in respect of the CDs issued by banks shall be governed by relevant
regulations of the Reserve Bank.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be governed by relevant regulations of the reserve bank

controls.control_objective: To ensure be as per the applicable accounting standards prescribed by the institute of chartered accountants of india (icai) or other standard setting organisat
controls.control_description:
(j) Accounting
Accounting for CD transactions shall be as per the applicable accounting standards
prescribed by the Institute of Chartered Accountants of India (ICAI) or other standard
setting organisations or as specified by the relevant regulations of the Reserve Bank.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be as per the applicable accounting standards prescribed by the institute of chartered accountants of india (icai) or other standard setting organisat

controls.control_objective: To ensure be reported by the issuer to the trade repository (tr), i
controls.control_description:
(a) Primary issuance
Details of primary issuance of a CD shall be reported by the issuer to the Trade Repository
(TR), i.e., Financial Market Trade Reporting and Confirmation Platform ("F-TRAC") of the
Clearing Corporation of India Ltd.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be reported by the issuer to the trade repository (tr), i

controls.control_objective: To ensure be reported, with time stamp, within 15 minutes of execution (the time when price is agreed) on the f-trac platform by each counterparty to the transa
controls.control_description:
(b) Secondary market transactions
All secondary market transactions executed in OTC market and/or on the recognised stock
exchanges in CDs shall be reported, with time stamp, within 15 minutes of execution (the
time when price is agreed) on the F-TRAC platform by each counterparty to the
transaction.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be reported, with time stamp, within 15 minutes of execution (the time when price is agreed) on the f-trac platform by each counterparty to the transa

controls.control_objective: To ensure be reported by the issuer on the f-trac platform by
controls.control_description:
(c) Buyback transactions
Details of the buyback of a CD shall be reported by the issuer on the F-TRAC platform by
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be reported by the issuer on the f-trac platform by

controls.control_objective: To ensure report to the reserve bank, the details of the cds held with them in the dematerialised form, in the prescribed format furnished in annex i, at fortni
controls.control_description:
(d) Reporting by depositories
The depositories shall report to the Reserve Bank, the details of the CDs held with them
in the dematerialised form, in the prescribed format furnished in Annex I, at fortnightly
intervals (on the 15th day and on the last day of the month) and as and when called upon
to do so by the Reserve Bank.
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to report to the reserve bank, the details of the cds held with them in the dematerialised form, in the prescribed format furnished in annex i, at fortni

controls.control_objective: To ensure furnish the information, statement or clarification
controls.control_description:
Obligation to provide information sought by the Reserve Bank
The Reserve Bank may call for any information or statement or seek any clarification, which in
the opinion of the Reserve Bank is relevant, from persons or agencies dealing in the CDs,
including eligible issuers/ investors and such persons, agencies and participants shall furnish
the information, statement or clarification.
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to furnish the information, statement or clarification

controls.control_objective: To ensure publish any anonymised data related to transactions in primary and secondary markets in cds
controls.control_description:
Dissemination of data
The Reserve Bank or any other person authorised by the Reserve Bank, may publish any
anonymised data related to transactions in primary and secondary markets in CDs.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to publish any anonymised data related to transactions in primary and secondary markets in cds

controls.control_objective: To ensure , in addition to taking any penal or regulatory action in accordance with law, disallow that person or agency from dealing in the cd market for a peri
controls.control_description:
Violation of Directions
In the event of any person or agency violating any provision of these Directions or the
provisions of any other applicable law, the Reserve Bank may, in addition to taking any penal
or regulatory action in accordance with law, disallow that person or agency from dealing in the
CD market for a period not exceeding one month at a time, after providing reasonable
opportunity to the person or agency to defend its actions, and such action will be made public
by the Reserve Bank.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to , in addition to taking any penal or regulatory action in accordance with law, disallow that person or agency from dealing in the cd market for a peri

controls.control_objective: To ensure abide by the provisions of any directions, regulations or guidelines issued by any regulator or any other authority that may be applicable, in respect
controls.control_description:
Applicability of other laws, directions, regulations or guidelines
Participants in CD market shall abide by the provisions of any directions, regulations or
guidelines issued by any regulator or any other authority that may be applicable, in respect
of issue of or investment in CDs provided that such directions, regulations or guidelines do
not conflict with these Directions.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to abide by the provisions of any directions, regulations or guidelines issued by any regulator or any other authority that may be applicable, in respect

controls.control_objective: To ensure prevail
controls.control_description:
In case of any conflicts, the provisions of these Directions
shall prevail.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to prevail

controls.control_objective: To ensure apply to the transactions in certificate of deposit entered into from the date these directions come into force
controls.control_description:
These Directions shall apply to the transactions in Certificate of Deposit entered into from the
date these Directions come into force.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to apply to the transactions in certificate of deposit entered into from the date these directions come into force

controls.control_objective: To ensure continue to be applicable to the cds issued in accordance with the said directions till the maturity of those cds
controls.control_description:
2/2016-17 dated July 07, 2016 shall continue to be applicable to the CDs issued in accordance
with the said Directions till the maturity of those CDs.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to continue to be applicable to the cds issued in accordance with the said directions till the maturity of those cds
